title: Quelxy's Trailer Experience
description: Become the star in your own movie!
body:
![Quelxy's Trailer Experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54edfd2661fe4192eca6dad318a5f896a3e3ca06.png)



![Something](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e22555096dbf8c53ee9f4eb303bf486d237d16b.png)

Ever dreamed of stepping into the world of a Minecraft trailer? No more longing stares at those epic landscapes - this modpack makes that dream come true! Prepare to be amazed by lush, glowing biomes bathed in the warm caress of a setting sun. Dramatic shadows dance across the terrain, adding depth and mystery to every exploration. This isn't just Minecraft; it's a cinematic masterpiece, and you're the star.

Quelxy's Trailer Experience isn't just another attempt to capture the magic of trailers. There's a few key changes to the originals and added exciting new elements to the mix to ensure an experience that's both familiar and refreshingly unique. Gone are the days of settling for a boxy world. It's Minecraft as you've always imagined it, bursting with vibrancy and begging to be explored. Are you ready to create your own epic Minecraft adventure? Dive into your own new beautiful world and see for yourself!

# 📱 Features
- **__See further__** with [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) and [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- **__Invite your friends__** into your own cinematic world with [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
- **__Beautiful worlds__** with the combination of [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) and [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)
- **__Better sound__** and ambience with [AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds), [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) and more
- **__Amazing animations__** not only for your favorite pets or enemies but also for you with [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) and [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)
- **__Much more__** like the new GUI look or improved particles
